title: China's Coal Imports From Mongolia Set Another Record in December
section_path: China's Coal Imports From Mongolia Set Another Record in December
section_path_text: China's Coal Imports From Mongolia Set Another Record in December
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
December saw coal imports from Indonesia total 21.1 million tons, which is up from November by 2.8 million tons (15%) and up year-on-year by 4 million tons (23%). This has also marked the largest amount imported since March. Image reference: $1.jpg | assets/2024-02-13_chinas-coal-imports-from-mongolia-set-another-record-in-december_img_241_7c20e7621505.jpg
Imports from Mongolia totaled a record 8 million tons.
